title: Verify successful login with valid email and password.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page, containing 'Email' and 'Password' input fields and a 'Login' button, is displayed.

steps.action: Enter a registered and active email address (e.g., 'user@example.com') into the 'Email' field.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field displays the entered email address.

steps.action: Enter the correct password associated with the email address (e.g., 'SecurePass123!') into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input (e.g., asterisks or dots).

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the application's dashboard or home page. User's profile information (e.g., username, profile icon) is visible.

title: Verify 'Remember Me' functionality for persistent login.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Enter a registered email address into the 'Email' field.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field displays the entered email address.

steps.action: Enter the correct password into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input.

steps.action: Check the 'Remember Me' checkbox (if available).
steps.expected: The 'Remember Me' checkbox is selected.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard/home page.

steps.action: Close the web browser completely.
steps.expected: The browser window is closed.

steps.action: Reopen the browser and navigate to the application's base URL.
steps.expected: User is automatically logged in and redirected to the dashboard/home page without requiring re-entry of credentials.

title: Verify login failure with an unregistered email address.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Enter an email address that does not exist in the system (e.g., 'nonexistent@example.com') into the 'Email' field.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field displays the entered email address.

steps.action: Enter any password (e.g., 'anypassword123') into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: An error message 'Invalid email or password' (or similar) is displayed on the login page. User remains on the login page.

title: Verify login failure with a valid email but incorrect password.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Enter a registered email address (e.g., 'user@example.com') into the 'Email' field.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field displays the entered email address.

steps.action: Enter an incorrect password (e.g., 'WrongPassword!') into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: An error message 'Invalid email or password' (or similar) is displayed on the login page. User remains on the login page.

title: Verify client-side validation for an invalid email format.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Enter an email address with an invalid format (e.g., 'user@.com', 'userexample.com', 'user@example') into the 'Email' field.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field displays the entered value.

steps.action: Enter a valid password (e.g., 'SecurePass123!') into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: A client-side validation error message 'Please enter a valid email address' (or similar) is displayed next to the 'Email' field. User remains on the login page.

title: Verify login failure when the email field is left empty.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Leave the 'Email' field empty.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field is empty.

steps.action: Enter a valid password (e.g., 'SecurePass123!') into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: A client-side validation error message 'Email is required' (or similar) is displayed next to the 'Email' field. User remains on the login page.

title: Verify login failure when the password field is left empty.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Enter a valid email address (e.g., 'user@example.com') into the 'Email' field.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field displays the entered email address.

steps.action: Leave the 'Password' field empty.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field is empty.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: A client-side validation error message 'Password is required' (or similar) is displayed next to the 'Password' field. User remains on the login page.

title: Verify login failure for a locked or disabled user account.

steps.action: Ensure a specific user account (e.g., 'locked@example.com') is in a locked or disabled state in the system for testing purposes.
steps.expected: The account 'locked@example.com' is confirmed to be in a locked/disabled state.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Enter the email address of the locked account (e.g., 'locked@example.com') into the 'Email' field.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field displays the entered email address.

steps.action: Enter the correct password for the locked account into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: An error message 'Your account is locked. Please contact support.' (or similar) is displayed on the login page. User remains on the login page.

title: Verify successful login when email and password fields contain leading/trailing spaces (trimmed).

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Enter a registered email address with leading and trailing spaces (e.g., '  user@example.com  ') into the 'Email' field.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field displays the entered value including spaces.

steps.action: Enter the correct password with leading and trailing spaces (e.g., '  SecurePass123!  ') into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input including spaces.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard/home page, indicating that spaces were trimmed before authentication.

title: Verify password field visibility toggle functionality.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Enter a password (e.g., 'MySecretPass') into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input (e.g., '**********').

steps.action: Click the 'Show Password' icon/button (e.g., an eye icon) next to the password field.
steps.expected: The entered password text 'MySecretPass' is visible in plain text in the 'Password' field. The icon changes to indicate 'Hide Password'.

steps.action: Click the 'Hide Password' icon/button again.
steps.expected: The password text is masked again (e.g., '**********'). The icon changes back to 'Show Password'.

title: Verify successful login with a newly reset password.

steps.action: Precondition: A user account (e.g., 'resetuser@example.com') has successfully completed the password reset process and a new password (e.g., 'NewPass!456') has been set.
steps.expected: The password for 'resetuser@example.com' is updated to 'NewPass!456' in the system.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Enter the email address (e.g., 'resetuser@example.com') into the 'Email' field.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field displays the entered email address.

steps.action: Enter the newly reset password (e.g., 'NewPass!456') into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard/home page, demonstrating that the new password is valid.

title: Verify login failure for an account that has not completed email verification (if applicable).

steps.action: Precondition: Register a new user account (e.g., 'unverified@example.com') but ensure the email verification step is not completed.
steps.expected: User account 'unverified@example.com' exists in the system but is marked as 'unverified'.

steps.action: Navigate to the application's login page.
steps.expected: The login page is displayed.

steps.action: Enter the unverified account's email (e.g., 'unverified@example.com') into the 'Email' field.
steps.expected: The 'Email' field displays the entered email address.

steps.action: Enter the correct password for the unverified account into the 'Password' field.
steps.expected: The 'Password' field displays masked input.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button.
steps.expected: An error message 'Please verify your email address to log in.' (or similar) is displayed on the login page. User remains on the login page, possibly with an option to resend the verification email.
